zh.Kreis Jülich, Rhineland, Prussia, German: 德國福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_海普洛文次爾利
zh.Kortrijk, West-Vlaanderen, Vlaanderen, B: 比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon於1255年出生在法國崔傑維爾時，她的父親Hervé III seigneur de Vierzon21歲，母親Jeanne de Brenne20歲。她於1274年與Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1296年在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon于1255年出生在法国崔傑維爾时，她的父亲Hervé III seigneur de Vierzon21岁，母亲Jeanne de Brenne20岁。她于1274年与Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1296年在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon was born in 1255, in Vierzon, Cher, Centre, France, her father, Hervé III seigneur de Vierzon, was 21 and her mother, Jeanne de Brenne, was 20. She married Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot in 1274. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1296, in Kortrijk, West Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon est née en 1255, à Vierzon, Cher, Centre, France, son père, Hervé III seigneur de Vierzon, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Brenne, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot en 1274. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1296, à Kortrijk, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon 1255 in Vierzon, Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hervé III seigneur de Vierzon 21 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Brenne 20. Sie hat 1274 Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1296 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Kortrijk, West-Flandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon è nata il nel 1255 nel Vierzon, Cher, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Hervé III seigneur de Vierzon, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Brenne, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot nel 1274. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1296, nel Kortrijk, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzonが1255年にフランスセントアチャーヴィエルゾンで生まれた時，父Hervé III seigneur de Vierzonは21歳，母Jeanne de Brenneは20歳であった。1274年にGodfried van Brabant-Aarschotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1296年にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンコルトリジクで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon(이)가 1255년 프랑스 세트르 처 비르존에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hervé III seigneur de Vierzon(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Brenne(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1274년 Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1296년 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 코르트리j크에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon nasceu em 1255, em Vierzon, Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Hervé III seigneur de Vierzon, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Brenne, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot em 1274. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1296, em Kortrijk, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon родилась в 1255 г. в местности виирзон, чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Hervé III seigneur de Vierzon было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Brenne, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot в 1274 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1296 г. в местности кортриджк, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon nació en 1255, en Vierzon, Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Hervé III seigneur de Vierzon, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Brenne, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot en 1274. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1296, en Kortrijk, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, a la edad de 41 años.
